TermsPage.title: Terms of Use
TermsPage.updated: Last updated: June 15, 2026. Please read the terms carefully before using our service.
TermsPage.contactDesc: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Use, please send your feedback to our support email at

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.content: By accessing and using AI_Lab services, you agree to be bound by the following terms, conditions, and applicable laws. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please stop using the website immediately.

2.title: 2. Account and Security
2.content: When registering an account at AI_Lab, you are responsible for providing accurate and up-to-date information. You are solely responsible for keeping your password secure and for all activities that occur under your account. Please notify the administrator immediately if you suspect unauthorized use of your account.

3.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
3.content: All content posted on the website, including articles, prompts, images, source code, and related documents, belongs to the author or AI_Lab. You are granted a non-exclusive license for personal, non-commercial use. Any copying, distribution, or commercialization of content without the owner's consent is strictly prohibited.

4.title: 4. User Conduct Guidelines
4.content: Users are not allowed to post content that violates the law, morals, defames, harasses, or infringes on the rights of others. All forms of spam, spreading malicious code, or taking actions that negatively affect the performance of the system are strictly prohibited.

5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
5.content: The services and information on AI_Lab are provided 'as is' without any warranty. We are not responsible for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of the website or the information referenced on the system.

6.title: 6. Changes to Terms
6.content: AI_Lab reserves the right to modify and update these terms at any time without prior notice. Changes will take effect as soon as they are posted. Your continued use of the service after the terms are updated means you agree to those changes.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.updated: Last updated: June 15, 2026. AI_Lab always strives to protect your data and personal information.
PrivacyPage.contactDesc: For any questions, feedback, or complaints regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us via email:

1.title: 1. Information We Collect
1.content: We collect information when you register an account, submit articles, comment, or participate in other activities. Information includes: username, email address, avatar, and your IP address. This information helps improve the user experience on the system.

2.title: 2. How We Use Information
2.content: The collected information is used to maintain, operate, and enhance the quality of AI_Lab's services. We may use your email to send technical update notifications, account-related notices, or newsletters of featured articles if you subscribe.

3.title: 3. Information Protection and Storage
3.content: All your personal information is stored on secure servers. We apply advanced security measures (such as SSL/TLS encryption) to prevent unauthorized access, modification, or disclosure of your personal information.

4.title: 4. Sharing Information with Third Parties
4.content: AI_Lab commits NOT to sell, trade, or rent your personal information to any third party for commercial purposes. We only share information when clearly required by law or to protect the safety of the entire community.

5.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
5.content: We use cookies to save interface preferences, analyze traffic, and maintain your login state. You can choose to disable cookies in your browser settings; however, some features may not function optimally.

6.title: 6. Your Rights Regarding Personal Information
6.content: You have the right to access, edit, or request the deletion of your personal information directly through the account management page. If there are any issues in exercising this right, please contact our support team directly.
